title: Dispatcher: split task-dispatcher.mjs into focused modules
description:
task-dispatcher.mjs is 2,349 lines and handles too many concerns: task loading, state merging, dead session recovery, stale claim release, dependency resolution, dispatch, hook polling, push/PR creation, stage validation, notification, and logging. This makes individual functions hard to test and the file difficult to navigate.

Proposed split into `operations/bin/dispatcher/` directory:
- `loader.mjs` — loadTasks(), applyRuntimeTaskState(), shouldPreferCanonicalControlState(), normalizeTerminalTasks()
- `claims.mjs` — inspectActiveHookClaims(), isSessionDead(), recoverDeadSession(), isClaimStale()
- `github.mjs` — runGh(), maybePushAndCreatePR(), collectTaskGitEvidence(), ensureSpecialistRepoView()
- `validation.mjs` — validateStageCompletion(), pickExecutor(), statusForDispatch()
- `notify.mjs` — notifyAndRecord(), appendAlert(), appendLog()
- `dispatch.mjs` — dispatchTask(), postHookWithCurl(), hookPoll()
- `index.mjs` — main(), argument parsing, orchestration

Keep the existing `task-dispatcher.mjs` as a thin entry point that imports and calls `index.mjs` for backwards compatibility with the systemd service.

Do not change any function signatures or behavior — this is a pure refactor.
handoff_notes:
[agent:engineer][task:ops-0045] implemented and validated.

Files changed:
- operations/bin/task-dispatcher.mjs: reduced to a thin backwards-compatible entry point
- operations/bin/dispatcher/index.mjs: orchestration entrypoint with direct-run guard to avoid double execution when imported by the wrapper
- operations/bin/dispatcher/claims.mjs: stale-claim and dead-session handling
- operations/bin/dispatcher/dispatch.mjs: dispatch execution and hook interaction
- operations/bin/dispatcher/github.mjs: repo view, push, and PR helpers
- operations/bin/dispatcher/loader.mjs: task loading, runtime-state merge, terminal normalization
- operations/bin/dispatcher/notify.mjs: dispatcher logging, alerts, and notifications
- operations/bin/dispatcher/validation.mjs: stage validation and executor selection; summarizeTask export fixed during validation
- docs/reports/2026-04-19_refactor-summary_dispatcher-split-validation.md: validation record for the split

Validation performed:
- node --check for all dispatcher modules
- node operations/bin/task-dispatcher.mjs --dry-run --limit 1
- node operations/bin/dispatcher/index.mjs --dry-run --limit 1
- isolated fixture run under /tmp with one dispatchable task and one dependency-blocked task; both wrapper and direct index path produced a single dispatch_dry_run and a single dependency_block event

Commits:
- 5e1f7db
- 9bc5781

Branch: agent/engineer/ops-0045-dispatcher-modular-split

artifacts.description: Clean orchestration layer: all imports at top, removed duplicate function declarations already in dispatch.mjs/claims.mjs, main() delegates dispatch loop to dispatchTask() and only auto-runs when invoked directly
Thin backwards-compatible entry point that imports dispatcher/index.mjs and still records fatal errors to dispatcher logs
Validation report covering syntax checks, dry-run entrypoint checks, and isolated fixture behavior
